title: Permissions / activities
excerpt:
Good morning, 
I would like to know if it is possible to hide board activities for guest users (with enterprise plan). 
The objective is to open access to customers without them being able to see each other.

posts.author: Jean (D)
posts.cookedHtml:
Good morning,

I would like to know if it is possible to hide board activities for guest users (with enterprise plan).
The objective is to open access to customers without them being able to see each other.

posts.author: CharlotteK (Charlotte Kirkham)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hey Jean! Just to confirm; are you trying to make sure they don’t see each other in the list of board members? Or are you trying to hide the Activity Log?

You could use the board permissions to make it so that users can only see what is assigned to them, however, they may still be able to see who else is added to the board.

posts.author: Jean (D)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hello Charlotte,

As they are in “guest” access, I would like the guests not to see themselves on the board.

Do permissions prevent mentioning someone else? Only for guest users.
Of course, I’ll use the feature so they only see their items.

(sorry for my English)
Thanks,
Jean Baptiste
